user.title: Connect to ZigbeeLens Core
user.description: Enter the URL of your running ZigbeeLens Core service.

data.panel_enabled: Show ZigbeeLens companion panel in the sidebar

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to ZigbeeLens Core at the configured URL.
error.invalid_url: Enter a valid URL including http:// or https://.
error.invalid_response: The endpoint did not return a valid ZigbeeLens response.

abort.already_configured: This ZigbeeLens Core URL is already configured.

data.panel_enabled: Show ZigbeeLens companion panel in the sidebar

core_unreachable.title: ZigbeeLens Core is unreachable
core_unreachable.description: Home Assistant cannot reach ZigbeeLens Core at the configured URL.

collector_disconnected.title: MQTT collector disconnected
collector_disconnected.description: ZigbeeLens Core is running but the read-only MQTT collector is disconnected.

no_networks_configured.title: No Zigbee2MQTT networks configured
no_networks_configured.description: ZigbeeLens Core reports zero configured networks.

no_mqtt_data.title: No MQTT data observed yet
no_mqtt_data.description: Networks are configured but ZigbeeLens has not observed device data yet.

mock_mode_active.title: Mock mode active
mock_mode_active.description: ZigbeeLens Core is running in mock mode rather than live MQTT collection.
